page: Google Cloud Platform n2-highmem-128 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 128 vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores on an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.6 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, this instance allocates dedicated CPU resources with hyper-threading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. It is equipped with 864.0 GB of system memory, providing 6.75 GB of RAM per core. The processor features a 54 MB L3 cache, 1 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache, alongside hardware support for AVX-512 vector extensions, AES cryptography, and SHA instructions. No local storage or GPUs are bundled with this instance.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 120,775.82 and a Passmark CPU score of 84,295.77, placing it in the top tier. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching 329.21 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 141.27 GB/sec for write operations. Single-core performance is moderate, as evidenced by a Geekbench single-core score of 1,579.0. However, the platform excels in parallelized tasks, achieving top-tier results in ray tracing and encryption tests. For database operations, it demonstrates strong throughput with 109.06 million Redis SET operations per second and a static web serving throughput of 73.26 GB/sec. Large language model inference speeds are strong for prompt processing on small and medium models, though text generation on large 70B models is a performance bottleneck at 2.68 tokens per second.

Given its high memory-to-vCPU ratio and dedicated compute resources, the n2-highmem-128 offers high resource density for enterprise workloads without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. It is highly suited for memory-intensive applications, large-scale database hosting, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing pipelines.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highmem-128 is an x86_64 virtual server configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs (64 physical cores) and 864.0 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features a 54 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AES cryptography. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs. Benchmark results show top-tier multi-core CPU performance and strong memory bandwidth, with large-block read speeds reaching 329.21 GB/sec and database operations performing at high efficiency. While single-core speeds are average, its massive parallel processing capacity and high memory density make it highly effective for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large databases, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highmem-128 is a memory-optimized server with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 864 GB RAM, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highmem-128 features 128 vCPUs, 864 GB RAM, and Intel Xeon processors for high-capacity database and memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized virtual server delivering exceptional multi-core processing and memory bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated vCPUs and 864 GB of RAM powered by Intel Xeon processors
Top-tier multi-core performance and high-speed memory bandwidth
Supports AVX-512 vector extensions and hardware-accelerated cryptography
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for large-scale databases, memory-intensive applications, and parallel processing
